resources.string: org.nitcwiki.account
About the WikiNITC app
WikiNITC puzzle globe logo

An automated filter has identified this edit as potentially unconstructive, or potential vandalism.

WikiNITC is an encyclopedia and only neutral, notable content belongs here.

Vanishing is a last resort and should only be used when you wish to stop editing forever and also to hide as many of your past associations as possible.

Account deletion on WikiNITC is done by changing your account name to make it so others cannot recognize your contributions in a process called account vanishing. Vanishing does not guarantee complete anonymity or remove contributions to the projects.
Discover through WikiNITC
Log in or create an account to view your activity on the WikiNITC app
On WikiNITC Android
Explore stats for games, saved articles, and other activities that connect you more deeply with WikiNITC.
Add WikiNITC languages
WikiNITC Alpha
WikiNITC Beta
WikiNITC
We\'re sorry, the WikiNITC app has experienced an error and was terminated.\n\nWould you like to start over or quit?
Thanks for your continued interest in editing article descriptions! To make additional edits, please log in to your WikiNITC account.
Thanks for editing WikiNITC!
You just made WikiNITC better for everyone
Thank you! Your generosity to WikiNITC means so much to us.
Thank you, dear donor! Your generosity helps keep WikiNITC and other free knowledge projects thriving.
You set up a donation reminder on %1$s to give %3$s every %2$s you read. Ready to follow through on your pledge to support WikiNITC?
Donation reminders are on. WikiNITC will remind you to donate %1$s every %2$s you read while this experiment runs.
Donations go to the Wikimedia Foundation and affiliates, proud hosts of WikiNITC and other free knowledge projects.
Your generosity helps keep WikiNITC thriving. Set up a donation reminder based on the number of articles you read.

Unsure where to get started with editing? Try Suggested Edits, a feature that creates opportunities to make small but vital contributions to WikiNITC. Alternatively, go directly to an article of interest and make a change using wikitext.
Editing in the WikiNITC app
WikiNITC does not have a user page with this exact name. In general, this page should be created and edited by %2$s. If in doubt, please verify that \"%3$s\" exists.
Featured articles are some of the highest-quality articles on WikiNITC, selected daily by editors
Discover articles personalized to your interests in For You, or browse WikiNITC\'s best editorial content in Community.
Note that not all card types are available in all WikiNITC languages. Edit your selected languages in Settings.
Daily featured article on WikiNITC
Main page of WikiNITC with daily featured content
Suggestions to add content to WikiNITC
You are currently using an unsupported generic Chinese language variant as your primary WikiNITC language
No games available in this language yet! Games leverage content created by volunteer editors for each language\'s WikiNITC.
Sourced from human written WikiNITC articles
You will decide if a suggested image should be placed in a WikiNITC article.
Images are from Wikimedia Commons, a collection of freely licensed images used by WikiNITC.
Your WikiNITC languages
You have been logged out of WikiNITC. Would you like to log in again?
Join WikiNITC
Log in / join WikiNITC
WikiNITC reading lists (%s and more).json
Log in to WikiNITC
WikiNITC notifications
Notifications from WikiNITC
WikiNITC
WikiNITC games are available in the Games Hub, found in the MORE menu.
WikiNITC games
WikiNITC games

I have encountered a problem with the WikiNITC games feature:
- [Describe specific problem]

The behavior I would like to see is:
- [Describe proposed solution]
Issue Report - WikiNITC games
I\'m playing \"Which came first?\" a daily trivia game on the WikiNITC Android app %s

Dive down the WikiNITC rabbit hole with a constantly updating Home feed.
Customize the feed to your interests – whether it\'s learning about historical events On this day, or rolling the dice with Random.
Learn more about WikiNITC
WikiNITC is a free online encyclopedia with 65 million articles collaboratively written and maintained in more than 300 languages by a community of volunteers.

You can make reading lists from articles you want to read later, even when you\'re offline.
Login to your WikiNITC account to sync your reading lists. Join WikiNITC
Enhance the quality of WikiNITC content by actively reviewing a feed of recent edits and providing guidance, quality control, and encouragement to other editors.
Contribute to the oversight and approval of WikiNITC edits.

Hello {{{username}}}. Your article is a great start! To make it even better, consider adding more references to reliable sources. This helps verify the information and improves the article\'s quality. Check out this WikiNITC\'s guidelines on [[WikiNITC:Reliable_sources|reliable sources]] for more details.

Hello {{{username}}}, some contributions you have made are possibly machine translations, which is why they have been modified or marked with the template. If no improvements are made to the article, it may be deleted.\n\nIf, despite all this information, you still have any questions, feel free to leave a message on [[User talk:{{{senderUserName}}}|my talk page]]. Don\'t be discouraged by this little incident. Your contributions are very important to WikiNITC.

Hello {{{username}}}, I appreciate your collaboration on WikiNITC; However, I noticed you are in a [[WikiNITC:Conflict_of_interest|conflict of interest]]. A conflict of interest is the incompatibility between WikiNITC's objectives of neutrality and reliability and the particular objectives of certain editors, individuals, entities, or companies of any type.

All contributions in the main space are subject to the policies of content criteria of this WikiNITC ([[WikiNITC:What_WikiNITC_is_not|what WikiNITC is not]]), encyclopedic quality ([[WikiNITC:Verifiability|verifiability]] and [[WikiNITC:No_original_research|no original research]]), editorial method ([[WikiNITC:Neutral_point_of_view|neutral point of view]]), and legitimacy of content ([[WikiNITC:Copyrights|copyrights]]). All publishers are expected to abide by these policies when creating and evaluating content and to respect and assume good faith in the actions of other publishers to ensure that these policies are followed.

If you edit under a conflict of interest, you must apply the corresponding policy with special care; Otherwise, your user account could be considered private purpose and blocked. Feel free to reach out on my talk page if you have any questions.
Your recent edit appears to include copyrighted material without permission. Please ensure all content complies with this WikiNITC\'s [[WikiNITC:Copyrights|copyright]] policies to avoid removal.

Hi {{{username}}}, it appears you removed content without discussing it on the article talk page. Please note that WikiNITC is not censored, and content should not be removed because it is controversial. If you believe the information is inaccurate, please reach a consensus on the article talk page.
Hi {{{username}}}, it appears you removed content from WikiNITC without leaving an edit summary. Please leave an edit summary whenever you add or remove content to WikiNITC.

Hi {{{username}}}, I am delighted that WikiNITC has caught your attention and that you have been interested in learning how to edit on it. The editing test you did worked; However, you should keep in mind that the goal of this project is to develop a reliable and complete encyclopedia that everyone can consult. Your edit affected the content, so it has been removed.\nIf you want to learn how to edit WikiNITC, the [[WikiNITC:Sandbox|sandbox]] is at your disposal. If your comments were specific to an article, the correct place is that article\'s talk page.
Because you made multiple destructive edits, this will serve as your final warning. Should you vandalize WikiNITC again, you will be banned from editing.

Hello {{{username}}}, some contributions you have made do not meet the neutrality required to comply with this WikiNITC\'s [[WikiNITC:NPOV|neutral point of view]] policy. For this reason, some content has been modified or removed. Please modify the paragraphs or sections that show a partial point of view, replacing them with a more neutral and objective text in line with what is expected in an encyclopedia.
Places is a map-based way to explore WikiNITC
Sync reading lists across different devices by saving them to your WikiNITC account
Sync reading lists across different devices by saving them to your WikiNITC account \"%s\"
WikiNITC languages
Celebrate WikiNITC\'s 25th birthday by joining the 25-day reading challenge!
Log in / Join WikiNITC
Explore WikiNITC
Celebrate completing the challenge with 15%% off at the WikiNITC Store.
Articles saved to reading lists can now be synced to your WikiNITC account. Learn more
Hi! I\'d like to share my WikiNITC reading list with you:
Log in / join WikiNITC
Reading lists can now be synced across devices. Log in to your WikiNITC account and allow your lists to be saved.
Reading lists can now be synced across devices. Log in to your WikiNITC account and allow your lists to be saved. Learn more
Articles saved to reading lists can now be synced to your WikiNITC account. Learn more
Your weekly reading list of WikiNITC articles, curated just for you.
When your Discover is updated, WikiNITC will send you a notification.
WikiNITC will not send you a notification when Discover is updated.
Discover is off. WikiNITC won\'t recommend you articles to read.
Discover is on. WikiNITC will recommend you articles to read.
If you turn off Discover, you\'ll stop receiving %s reading recommendations from WikiNITC.
Search WikiNITC in more languages
Search WikiNITC
Install the WikiNITC Search widget for instant access to knowledge from your home screen.
You have access to a custom icon that celebrates your %d in-app contributions to WikiNITC. It will remain until the next Year in Review.
%s (WikiNITC reading list).json
Your edit is currently live on WikiNITC
Log in / join WikiNITC

Suggested edits is a new way to edit WikiNITC on Android. It helps you make small but vital contributions to WikiNITC.\nOur goal is to make editing easier and more accessible for everyone! Log in or join WikiNITC to get started.
Did you know that everyone can edit WikiNITC?
%s\, thanks for your edits. Below you can find more ways to contribute to WikiNITC.
File page on WikiNITC
Add suggested images to WikiNITC articles to enhance understanding.
By adding image tags, you will help make images easier to search for on Commons, the free license image repository that WikiNITC uses for images in its articles.
It looks like your IP address (or range of IP addresses) is currently blocked from editing WikiNITC.
Hi %s\, below you can find some quick and easy ways to help improve WikiNITC. You\'ll see the difference you\'re making as soon as you get started. Happy editing!
Thanks for editing WikiNITC! Why not continue where you left off?
Have a minute to continue improving WikiNITC? Check out these editing suggestions.
Translation tasks are available if you read and write in more than one WikiNITC language.
Suggested edits presents opportunities for small but vital contributions to WikiNITC.
This is a talk page. Please respect the talk page guidelines, and remember to sign your posts by typing four tildes: ~~~~ when posting using wikitext.WikiNITC:Talk page guidelines
Topic subscriptions will allow you to receive notifications about new comments in this topic. Please create an account or log into your WikiNITC account to subscribe to a topic.
Talk pages are where people discuss how to make WikiNITC content the best it can be. Start by adding a new discussion topic to connect and collaborate with a community of WikiNITCns.
WikiNITC - discussion on talk page topic \"%s\"
WikiNITC - discussions on talk page
\'Thanks\' are an easy way to show appreciation for an editor\'s work on WikiNITC. \'Thanks\' cannot be undone and are publicly viewable
Today on WikiNITC
What is trending today on WikiNITC
Cannot connect to WikiNITC. Check your network connection, or try again later
The best articles WikiNITC has to offer
The fastest way to search WikiNITC
WikiNITC featured page
WikiNITC search
WikiNITC App FAQ
Daily trivia games based WikiNITC content.
WikiNITC games
You will only see content on the Home feed and quick search filters for remaining WikiNITC languages.
Keep at least one WikiNITC language from which to search and read content.
WikiNITC languages
See insights about which articles you read on the WikiNITC app and the edits you made.
Explore your WikiNITC Year in Review
How often WikiNITC was edited
WikiNITC logo
Thank you for spending your year with WikiNITC.
Log in / Join WikiNITC
WikiNITC Year in Review will create a reading list of the articles you spent the most time with in %1$d. Learn more
Here\'s my WikiNITC Year in Review. Created with the WikiNITC Android app %1$s %2$s
My WikiNITC Year in Review
The heart and soul of WikiNITC is our global community of volunteer contributors, donors, and billions of readers like yourself – all united to share unlimited access to reliable information.

We\'re glad WikiNITC was part of your %1$d! Unlock a special reward in your %2$d Year in Review by becoming a contributor—whether by editing WikiNITC or by donating from the app to the Wikimedia Foundation, the nonprofit behind it. If WikiNITC is useful to you, please consider donating to help sustain its future and keep it free, ad-free, trustworthy, and accessible to all. If you donated elsewhere, your support is deeply appreciated.

Activate your new app icon in Settings under App icon. Thank you for investing in the future of free knowledge. Your contributions as %1$s in %2$d are helping pave the way to a world of free information, and as a result you have unlocked a custom contributor icon for WikiNITC on your home screen.
English WikiNITC\'s most read articles
For people around the world, WikiNITC is the first stop when answering a question, looking up information for school or work, or learning a new fact.
WikiNITC W Icon

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_most_read_english_articles_body
plurals.item:
When people want to learn about our world, they turn to WikiNITC. The top %1$d visited article on English WikiNITC was: %2$s
Read more in our dedicated blog post.

When people want to learn about our world, they turn to WikiNITC. The top %1$d visited articles on English WikiNITC were: %2$s
Read more in our dedicated blog post.

plurals.item: Readers around the world appreciate your contributions. In the last 2 months, articles you\'ve edited have received %,d total view. Thanks to editors like you, WikiNITC is a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource for the world.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_bytes_added_body
plurals.item: In %1$d, volunteers added %2$,d byte to English WikiNITC. The sum of all their work together leads to a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource that they give to the world. All of us have knowledge to share, learn how to participate.

In %1$d, volunteers added %2$,d bytes to English WikiNITC. The sum of all their work together leads to a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource that they give to the world. All of us have knowledge to share, learn how to participate.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_edited_times_body
plurals.item: Thank you for being one of the volunteer editors making a difference on Wikimedia projects around the world. Volunteers like you made %,d change across over 300 different language editions of WikiNITC.

Thank you for being one of the volunteer editors making a difference on Wikimedia projects around the world. Volunteers like you made %,d changes across over 300 different language editions of WikiNITC.

These articles included %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s. Each saved article reflects your interests and helps build a personalized knowledge base on WikiNITC.
